alkylation reagent: alkylation with iodoacetamide (at a final concentration of 14 mM)
alkylation concentration: alkylation with iodoacetamide (at a final concentration of 14 mM)
enrichment method: the affinity purification of the biotinylated proteins
fractionation method: offline high-pH reverse-phase fractionation was carried out
instrument: coupled to an Orbitrap Eclipse mass spectrometer
ionization type: data were acquired in a positive ion mode
labeling: labeled with TMT10plex158 Isobaric Label Reagent
